violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The door to the outside (front door) is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Food and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Ice cream and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023
